steps.title: Find the temporal anchor
steps.content: "On August 15, 2013" is a specific past date. This temporal marker determines which verb tense to use.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
Rule: the verb tense must match the time anchor in the sentence. "On August 15, 2013" fixes the action in the completed past.

A — "will publish" Future tense. The publication already happened in 2013; "will" implies it hasn't occurred yet. Fails.

B — "published" Simple past. Matches the 2013 date, describing a completed action. Correct.

C — "publishes" Simple present. Presents the 2013 publication as if it happens habitually or right now. Fails.

D — "is publishing" Present progressive. Implies the Navajo Times is publishing the profile at this moment, not on August 15, 2013. Fails.

B is correct.
